film.title: Choked: Paisa Bolta Hai
film.overview: A bank employee weighed down by her jobless husband's debts - and her own broken dreams - finds a secret source of seemingly unlimited cash in her home.

dialogues.dialogue: They've laid out traps Careful, when you roll the dice Try to expose them And they'll change the topic Hide their shame with shrouds of opulence With shrouds of opulence Hide their shame

The ones I love are loved by all The ones I ditch are hung out to dry I build their palaces, I give them pride I build the people, I'm the joyride I build their palaces, I give them pride I build the people, I'm the joyride Money speaks the loudest
